title: Planned power outage: Airport Road area
description: GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - There is a planned power outage for a portion of the Airport Road and the Experiment Farm on Wednesday 11 February from 09:00 to 16:00 for carrying out alterations to the electrical mains.


> Consumers are warned to treat the installation as live for the full duration, as the supply may be restored at any time within the notified period.


Should circumstances prevent the work from being carried out during the abovementioned period, the work will be done on Thursday 12 February from 09:00 to 16:00.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
